title: dnata India South Asia Partners is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Junior)

jsonLd.title: dnata India South Asia Partners is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
dnata India South Asia Partners is actively seeking a talented and motivated Guest Relations Manager to join our dynamic team in Nagpur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About dnata India South Asia Partners:
dnata India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Yield Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with dnata India South Asia Partners!
